fantasy.sinopsis: The story follows three central figures—a disgraced soldier turned slave, a highprince haunted by visions of ancient legends, and a desperate young scholar—whose paths intertwine as an ancient, cataclysmic war threatens to return

fantasy.judul: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
fantasy.sinopsis: In J.K. Rowling's third novel, Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban, 13-year-old Harry returns to Hogwarts only to learn that Sirius Black, a maniacal mass-murderer and Voldemort loyalist, has escaped Azkaban prison.

fantasy.judul: A Court of Mist and Fury
fantasy.sinopsis: The smash-hit viral BookTok sensation. Feyre must navigate a deadly web of politics, dark passion, and colossal magical wars after striking a bargain with the terrifying High Lord of the Night Court.

The timeless, legendary prelude to The Lord of the Rings. Bilbo Baggins, a home-loving hobbit, is swept into a dangerous quest by a wizard and thirteen dwarves to reclaim a hoard of gold from a dragon.

sci-fi.sinopsis: The journey of Paul Atreides on the dangerous desert planet Arrakis as he seeks to claim the spice 'Melange', the most valuable commodity in the universe.
A lone astronaut awakens in space with no memory of his mission, and he must use science to complete his quest to save Earth.
The dystopian mega-bestseller. In a dark future world, Katniss Everdeen volunteers in place of her younger sister to survive a televised, nation-wide fight to the death controlled by the Capitol.

romance.sinopsis: The classic story of love, misunderstanding, and social class between the intelligent Elizabeth Bennet and the proud Mr. Darcy.
The massive multi-million copy global bestseller. Lily overcomes a rough childhood to open her own business, but finding love with a charming neurosurgeon forces her into difficult emotional choices.

thriller.sinopsis: The record-breaking psychological thriller. A famous painter shoots her husband five times and completely stops speaking. A determined criminal psychotherapist risks his career to unlock her silence.
The best-selling mystery novel in history. Ten strangers are lured to an isolated island mansion by a mysterious host, where they are executed one by one according to a creepy nursery rhyme.
